title: Aster DM Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Aster DM Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Aster DM Healthcare has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aster DM Healthcare:
Aster DM Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare!
